purpose: Machine-checkable v1 contract for the local credential authentication capability. This package specifies provider modes, dedicated credential stores, application-layer hybrid encrypted secret transport, challenge boundaries, the first persistent P0 HTTP/UI runtime and validation gates without making local credential auth production-complete.

runtimeBoundary.devRuntimeStorage: in-memory credential-auth repository seeded from bootstrap admin environment remains available only for development/test without repository driver/dsn
runtimeBoundary.p0RuntimeStorage: dedicated GORM credential-auth repository stores auth_identifiers, password_credentials, credential_challenges and sms_otp_challenges outside generic Record.Values
runtimeBoundary.secretTransport: application-layer hybrid encryption uses GET /api/auth/credential-secret-key, ECDH P-256 key agreement, HKDF-SHA256 derivation and AES-256-GCM/A256GCM encryption for password or SMS OTP secrets before submitting secret.encrypted; HTTPS remains a production baseline but is not the credential secret encryption mechanism and cannot be used as a substitute for secret.encrypted
runtimeBoundary.productionEnablementGate: production credential-auth requires repository driver/dsn plus PLATFORM_CREDENTIAL_AUTH_SECRET_TRANSPORT_KEY_ID and PLATFORM_CREDENTIAL_AUTH_SECRET_TRANSPORT_PRIVATE_KEY; productionComplete stays false until challenge runtime, live SMS delivery evidence, reset/rotation/migration governance and full audit/rate-limit gates are complete

extendsCapabilities.reason: SMS OTP delivery is reusable outside authentication and must not live inside credential-auth storage.

owns: login failure counters and lockout policy
doesNotOwn: JWT signing or server-side session issuance

genericRecordValuesPolicy.allowedGenericUse: Generic admin resources may reference masked, verified identifiers only when a capability explicitly declares sensitivity, storage and projection policy; credential secrets and challenge proofs require dedicated stores.

storageContracts.purpose: Map normalized identifiers to an admin or app principal without storing raw identifiers.
Store Argon2id password verifier metadata for a principal.
Store CAPTCHA or slider challenge transaction state for login.
Store SMS OTP transaction state and one-time consumption metadata.

secretTransportContract.httpsRole: production baseline only; not the application-layer credential secret encryption mechanism and cannot be used as a substitute for secret.encrypted

implementedNow: GET /api/auth/providers includes enabled credential-auth provider declarations
GET /api/auth/credential-secret-key exposes short-lived public key metadata for application-layer hybrid encrypted credential secrets
POST /api/auth/sms-otp/start starts phone SMS OTP transactions through notification.sms
POST /api/auth/login accepts structured encrypted credential-password and credential-sms-otp requests while preserving demo/OIDC compatibility
Admin login UI renders credential provider modes from discovery and encrypts credential secrets with WebCrypto
notProductionComplete: external Aliyun/Tencent live SMS adapters and delivery ledger
credential reset, password rotation, breach response and migration governance

endpoints.purpose: Discover enabled credential-auth provider modes alongside existing configured providers.
Return short-lived public key metadata for ECDH P-256, HKDF-SHA256 and AES-256-GCM/A256GCM encrypted credential secrets.
Create CAPTCHA or slider challenge transactions when the provider policy requires them.
Create an SMS OTP transaction and send the login template through notification.sms.
Submit a provider, structured identifier, structured secret and optional challenge proof; successful credential auth delegates session issuance to the existing session boundary.

implementationPackages.scope: identifier normalization/hash lookup, Argon2id PHC password verifier, memory repository, dedicated GORM persistence, encrypted secret transport, password verification service, SMS OTP one-time consumption service and bootstrap runtime are implemented under internal/platform/credentialauth and internal/platform/bootstrap

notification SMS channel port, mock-local sender, provider config validation and production fail-closed rules are implemented under internal/platform/notification and config/bootstrap; external vendor adapters remain

structured encrypted credential-password and credential-sms-otp login, credential-secret-key discovery plus SMS OTP start are wired in internal/platform/httpapi while preserving current demo/OIDC behavior; CAPTCHA/slider challenge runtime remains

provider-discovery driven Admin login form state is wired for username/password, phone/password, email/password and phone/SMS OTP, and credential secrets are encrypted with WebCrypto before login submission; full challenge UX and production polish remain
OpenAPI, error codes, audit redaction, rate limits, production env validator and CI gate integration
